negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. name: av_7cbb4b89-f1ea-4c3a-9cc1-c6b90e6b0757
prompt: The video opens with a first-person perspective from inside a vehicle, capturing a busy urban intersection under a partly cloudy sky. Several cars, including a black SUV on the right and a red sedan further ahead, are positioned at a traffic light. The intersection is clearly marked with road lines and traffic signals, with buildings and trees lining the streets. As the video progresses, the ego vehicle makes a U-turn, with the red sedan ahead turning left and its left blinker illuminated. The black SUV speeds forward, creating a dynamic shift in the scene. The surrounding environment remains consistent, with the same buildings and trees visible, but the movement of the cars adds a sense of motion and activity. By the final frame, the ego vehicle has completed the U-turn, and the red sedan is no longer in view, indicating successful navigation through the busy area.
